title: fagara leprieurii
intro: Fagara leprieurii, also known as Zanthoxylum leprieurii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fagara leprieurii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and insect repellent. Fagara leprieurii is often prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and can also be used in traditional medicine as a powder or decoction.
